commentary_text: The market is substantially more confident in an Ivory Coast win than the model: 83% versus 64%, a 19-percentage-point gap favoring the heavy favorite. The sportsbook and Polymarket also compress the draw to 11–12% and cut Curaçao's chances to around 5%, versus the model's 25% and 12% respectively. This sharpening of conviction across all three outcomes could reflect recent form, injury news, or lineup changes that the model has not yet incorporated. The dashboard flags this as a signal worth monitoring—agreement on direction paired with divergent confidence levels often signals real-time information at work, though neither source is inherently correct until the match concludes.
